title: Analytics - Help Guide Opened
scenario: Logs event when user opens Help Guide page, with delayed event count updates and default analytics elements.
steps: Wait for a few hours for event counts to update.
Check the event logs for the 'Help Guide Opened' event.

Verify the event includes the following default elements: graph for this event, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
expected: The 'Help Guide Opened' event is logged with all default elements present: graph for this event, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
